title: Calgary to wind down Green Line LRT project with costs estimated at $2.1B
author: Adam MacVicar
notes: Primary source for SD-014 and EVT-034. Province withdrew $1.53B via Dreeshen letter. City council 10-5 to terminate. $850M wind-down + $1.3B spent = $2.1B. Dreeshen: won't cover wind-down, blames 'decade-long mismanagement.'
